title: Christophe définitivement
overview: This intimate and musical documentary about the French megastar Christophe will have you screaming like a fan, as it tells the story of the unforgettable and nocturnal musician, author of the legendary song Aline (most recently featured in Wes Anderson’s The French Dispatch).

trailers.title: CHRISTOPHE…DÉFINITIVEMENT de Dominique Gonzalez-Foerster et Ange Leccia - Bande-annonce
